file_pattern: repos_OnBoard_projects_CACKLE - Card Adaptable Controller Kinetic Link Electronics_src_2s 40A PSU and charger_2s 40A PSU and charger.kicad_sch

assertions.description: No current sense detection despite R18 (5mOhm, 10W) being a high-power current sense resistor
No charger circuit detection despite board name being "2s 40A PSU and charger"
Missing regulator input/output cap warnings despite design_observations noting them

REVIEW: 16 false positive rf_matching detections — resistors (R18 5mOhm sense, R21/R12 10ohm, R24/R23 10k) and capacitors misidentified as antennas; these are power supply filter components on a PSU board
REVIEW: R27(120ohm)/R26(120ohm) RS-485 termination/bias resistors falsely detected as voltage divider between RS485+ and RS485-
REVIEW: BOM sum (92) does not match total_components (112) — 20 missing: net_tie(11)+test_point(6)+mounting_hole(2)=19, still 1 unaccounted
REVIEW: DNP count=11 but only 5 DNP entries in BOM, inconsistent
